# TS9205

**Category:** Macro Syntax · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Expected a compile-time constant string literal
```

## Explanation

This argument must be a string literal known at compile time.

Correct:
  cfg("debug", x, y)
  includeStr("./template.txt")

Incorrect:
  const path = "./template.txt";
  includeStr(path)  // Variable, not a literal

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
